name: static-site-toolkit
author: T. Hunold <codeposse@gmail>
description: Reusable static HTML toolkit for SEO, Open Graph, Twitter Cards, schema, accessibility, sitemaps, links, prettifying, and minification.

scripts.meta: npm run seo && npm run social && npm run schema
scripts.build: npm run meta && npm run ada && npm run breadcrumbs && npm run sitemap && npm run pretty
